results.cluster_name: Prochlorococcus cluster 16 (ATP synthase and CO2 metabolism)
results.cluster_functional_description: Enriched for ATP synthase (8/8 genes, p=8.40E-08) and CO2 metabolism genes (7/9 genes, p=1.80E-05).
results.cluster_temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 5.5 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.
results.treatment: Simulated diel light-dark cycle (14h light : 10h dark) over 48 hours
results.experimental_context: Axenic Prochlorococcus MED4 in Sargasso Seawater-based Pro99 medium (10 mM HEPES pH 7.5) at 24C; 14:10 L:D cycle with gradual dawn/dusk transitions; max PAR ~232 umol quanta m-2 s-1; custom Affymetrix MD4-9313 GeneChip; 50 timepoints at 2h intervals over 48h; duplicate cultures sampled alternately; RMA-normalized; Fourier analysis (FDR<0.10) for periodicity; soft clustering via Mfuzz (c=16, m=1.25)

results.treatment: Simulated diel light-dark cycle (14h light : 10h dark) over 48 hours
results.experimental_context: Axenic Prochlorococcus MED4 in Sargasso Seawater-based Pro99 medium (10 mM HEPES pH 7.5) at 24C; 14:10 L:D cycle with gradual dawn/dusk transitions; max PAR ~232 umol quanta m-2 s-1; custom Affymetrix MD4-9313 GeneChip; 50 timepoints at 2h intervals over 48h; duplicate cultures sampled alternately; RMA-normalized; Fourier analysis (FDR<0.10) for periodicity; soft clustering via Mfuzz (c=16, m=1.25)

results.cluster_functional_description: Includes genes involved in sulfur metabolism (cysD), heme synthesis (hemA), dehydrogenases, and several small RNAs, indicating diverse metabolic functions during iron stress.
results.cluster_temporal_pattern: Genes show differential expression during iron starvation and recovery, with dynamic regulation.
results.treatment: Iron starvation (-Fe) and rescue (+Fe added at 49h) time course; samples at 0/12/24/48h plus rescue R
results.experimental_context: Prochlorococcus MED4 in PRO99 (trace-metal clean) at 21C under continuous light at 27 umol photons m-2 s-1; clusters group genes by temporal expression profile across the full -Fe/+Fe time course

results.cluster_functional_description: Enriched for photosystem I and II components (p=1.50E-09 and 2.50E-05 respectively). Includes genes related to photosystem I and II such as psbA, psbD, and psaA.
results.cluster_temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression around mid-day (8.3 h in the paper^s time scale) with 24h periodicity, co-varying with light intensity.
results.treatment: Simulated diel light-dark cycle (14h light : 10h dark) over 48 hours
results.experimental_context: Axenic Prochlorococcus MED4 in Sargasso Seawater-based Pro99 medium (10 mM HEPES pH 7.5) at 24C; 14:10 L:D cycle with gradual dawn/dusk transitions; max PAR ~232 umol quanta m-2 s-1; custom Affymetrix MD4-9313 GeneChip; 50 timepoints at 2h intervals over 48h; duplicate cultures sampled alternately; RMA-normalized; Fourier analysis (FDR<0.10) for periodicity; soft clustering via Mfuzz (c=16, m=1.25)

results.cluster_functional_description: Enriched for translation genes, strongly downregulated during nitrogen starvation, indicating repression of protein synthesis.
results.experimental_context: Custom Affymetrix microarray MD4-9313; MED4 cells in Pro99 medium under continuous light (27 µmol photons m-2 s-1, 24°C); sampled at 0, 3, 6, 12, 24, 48h post N-deprivation

results.cluster_functional_description: Enriched for chaperone genes (7/14 genes, p=0.00023).
results.cluster_temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 21.0 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.
results.treatment: Simulated diel light-dark cycle (14h light : 10h dark) over 48 hours
results.experimental_context: Axenic Prochlorococcus MED4 in Sargasso Seawater-based Pro99 medium (10 mM HEPES pH 7.5) at 24C; 14:10 L:D cycle with gradual dawn/dusk transitions; max PAR ~232 umol quanta m-2 s-1; custom Affymetrix MD4-9313 GeneChip; 50 timepoints at 2h intervals over 48h; duplicate cultures sampled alternately; RMA-normalized; Fourier analysis (FDR<0.10) for periodicity; soft clustering via Mfuzz (c=16, m=1.25)

results.cluster_functional_description: Enriched for photosynthesis and respiration genes, including photosystem I genes (psaBDEIJKLM). Strongly downregulated during nitrogen starvation.
results.cluster_temporal_pattern: Strongly downregulated during nitrogen starvation, indicating repression of photosynthesis genes.
results.experimental_context: Custom Affymetrix microarray MD4-9313; MED4 cells in Pro99 medium under continuous light (27 µmol photons m-2 s-1, 24°C); sampled at 0, 3, 6, 12, 24, 48h post N-deprivation
